text: Draft the Prototype Fund application, work plan, and €47.5k solo budget
description: Answer the application questions concisely in German or English. Include problem, users, societal value, differentiation, technical challenges, six-month milestones, sustainable open-source path, team/expertise, and ecosystem engagement. Build a realistic work plan up to 950 hours and €47,500 at €50/hour under the current solo cap. Declare AI assistance transparently if requested by the application process, and keep all proposed outputs under accepted free/open licenses.

status.comment: Application drafting remains open. Do not structure planning primarily around hours; use outcomes and milestones, deriving any formally required hour figure only at submission time.
